---
applyTo: "README.md,.github/workflows/**/*.yml,.github/workflows/**/*.yaml"
---

When editing documentation or workflow files in this repository:

- Keep documentation in English and aligned with the current module layout and extension usage.
- Keep Maven Central publishing guidance and CI behavior consistent with the actual workflows and POM configuration.
- Avoid documenting procedures that rely on local-only setups or absolute paths. All documented procedures should be reproducible by any contributor.
